# PERF-92 negative: Fiber handler uses c.UserContext() inside the goroutine
lang: go
file: PERF-092-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"
)

func FireAndForget(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	go func() {
		process(c.UserContext())
	}()
	return c.SendString("queued")
}

func process(ctx context.Context) {
	_ = ctx
}
